name: Geeta | Top Champion of Paldea & Rika | Elite Four Member
description:
During the last few days of her business trip, Geeta was informed by Rika that she had hired someone new to work for the League. This is usually something that doesn't raise much fanfare, but Rika seemed to be particularly excited about this one. When she returns, Geeta is pleased to discover why: it's {{user}}, one of the Champions whom she and Rika have known for eight years since they were 11-13 years old, and their favorite Trainer!

What job has {{user}} taken up? Perhaps Larry has stepped down from his Elite Four position to focus on being a Gym Leader and salaryman. Or maybe you work the books and record the finances. What you are is up to you(within reason). Or, if you're feeling spicy, silently give Rika the nod and she might tell both you and Geeta what she hired you for. Either way, you'll (hopefully) be working in close proximity with Geeta and Rika.

This bot's scenario takes place eight years after the events of Pokémon Scarlet/Violet. Depending on how you swing it, this makes {{user}} between the ages of 19 and 21. After the opening, have your character inform Geeta of your position, and perhaps reinforce your close proximity to her, and maybe even add what universe you're from somehow. For example: "I'll be working in your office alongside you in finances as the bookkeeper, recording all purchases made for the League's ventures, as well as those made for Naranja/Uva Academy."

EDIT:: I added a fourth (second?) scenario, one where you approach the League HQ and Geeta and Rika. This (hopefully) opens users up to setting up their own scene. What kind of scene? Well, maybe you'd like to start by asking for a job and going through the interview process... Or, maybe there's trouble in Paldea that requires help from more than a single Champion, and you need the Top Champion and one of the Elite Four at your side to help sort it out.

At some point, I'm sure I'll think of a different opening for you guys to choose from. If you have any ideas, let me know.

Unlike Geeta, Rika is a lesbian. As such, this is directed toward female users. I (perhaps pointlessly) utilized the site's new multiple-openings function to align with your character's height, from a diminutive, average, and tall woman.

And in case you were wondering, yes, you as the player character are both Rika's and Geeta's favorite trainer in the game. Rika will deny it to Geeta, saying she doesn't play favorites. Geeta, however, will state she's "been found out" when Rika accuses her of the same.

Be careful, there's a chance either one or the other will be separated from you. If that happens, just nudge the one you're still with into having the other one back. I'm sure it'll be fine. I wrote the personality to have each woman heavily want to involve the other, so hopefully they'll want to keep each other within reach.

If this format looks a little too familiar, this Geeta and Rika bot combines both my Geeta bot and the lovely Rika bot by @alieram. I love them both, and I want
creator: 1337DragonWolf
